• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game where players dig deep underground to collect valuable resources.
  • The game features a procedurally generated world with various ores, crafting, building, and social interaction through a chat system.
  • Players can upgrade their mining equipment, purchase items from shops, and discover teleporters for fast travel across the map.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.localPlayer = { id: uuid(), gridX: 500, gridY: 4, x: 0, y: 0, fuel: 100, hull: 100, cargo: 0, money: 0, temp: 0, rotation: 0, isDrilling: false, drillTier: 0, heatResist: 0, xrayRange: 3, multiMine: 0, inventory: {}, selectedBlock: TILE_TYPES.CASING, stats: { blocksMined: {}, totalMined: 0, startTime: now() }, joinedAt: now(), teleporters: [] }; this.map = []; this.discovered = []; this.remotePlayers = {}; this.camera = { x: 0, y: 0 }; this.zoom = 1.0; this.particles = []; this.explosives = []; this.isAdmin = false; this.hostId = null; this.bannedIds = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('mm_banned') || '[]'); this.lastActionTime = 0; this.lastAutosave = 0; this.lastViewportSync = 0; this.fallHeight = 0; this.stationGridX = CONSTANTS.MAP_WIDTH / 2; this.stationGridY = 4; this.lastHostHeartbeat = 0; } }

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining adventure game featuring procedurally generated worlds where players can dig for resources, upgrade equipment, build structures, and interact with other players through chat and trading systems. The game includes a comprehensive shop system, teleporter network, and competitive leaderboard tracking mining statistics.
